list.description: Ordered list of films that are connected (chapters). For example The Terminator (5599876b9fa294101cba26cf) and Terminator 2: Judgment Day are connected, so they both will be listed as chapters and both will have the same chaptersId property (d48af2b35df9b7fb521ab299). Chapters usually sorted by their universe chronology. For example The Hobbit Trilogy was released after The Lord of the Rings Trilogy, but The Hobbit Trilogy will be listed in chapters first.
